{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":106},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7341668559289090878","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"唯一有点看不惯的就是富二代家的大姐，以为有几个钱就了不起了，真是够了，除了这个人，其他都还好吧"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1709369101,"group_id":"7246573886362356798","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3324513430289639"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7246573886362356798","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"174"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":17814,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7341661229244793662","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，系统只是给予技能，而不是帮助破案，这种文可能看起来更真实一点，主角年轻，为了卧底消失了三年，但是回归之后队友之间没有矛盾这种挺好的，虽然作者没写但是很好奇卧底前的剧情，比起升职到省厅，我还是更喜欢在警局破案的剧情，而且破了这么多案件除了最后的升职好像没有别的奖励了，这是正常的吗？
有几个女性角色，但是没有感情线，也没有什么讨人嫌的角色，团队配合的也挺好的，第一次看到把卧底时的手下一起带回警局这种剧情，有点特别，很好奇主角到底是有多厉害，才让坏人都闻风丧胆，成为界内的话题人物。
刑侦小白看不出什么毒点，是我喜欢的无女主刑侦文，期待作者大大的下一本小说[送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1709368675,"group_id":"7246573886362356798","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw1gHjUdTIlkjlbPABnB4yF1ub//sMO7HtUcIFzb9/yP","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e5f03ff7afd14127b3127e28261dec94~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776873856&x-signature=mj29vSe9JgWA%2FcKW%2FG774rFZRY8%3D","user_id":"3324513430289639","user_name":"鲨鲨温瑜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3324513430289639","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1705122820,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7246573886362356798","book_info":{"abstract":"秦宇，一个普通人， 机缘巧合之下降落到另一个平行世界里。
突然出现在脑海中的侦探系统让他瞬间意识到了自己跟之前的不同之处。
根据系统的指令，一个一个的完成任务。
入学警校，入职刑侦大队。
技能满级后，系统功成身退。
系统：“请宿主好好享受警局的生活。”
          “本系统的任务已经完成，再见。”
          “接下来的生活，就要靠宿主自己了。”

,"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"109164597040","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"174"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":17784,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1850},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7310987883530814260","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"整本书写的挺有意思的，剧情流畅没有违和感，金手指叶不算大，每一个案件逗很精彩，最起码不是那种让人一眼见底的，在我读了这么多年小说里可以说是很好看的，怎么评分这么低？"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1702223101,"group_id":"7246573886362356798","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N016fuhfXr9kOyulNlBXY6Fiy4mD21Zff7POTCsQg6QP","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4242338877022269","user_name":"dhhvn"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4242338877022269","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7246573886362356798","book_info":{"abstract":"秦宇，一个普通人，
